headline: The Bull Case For Ameren (AEE) Could Change Following New Midwest High-Voltage Grid Project Win
summary: Earlier this month, Ameren Corporation’s transmission subsidiary was chosen by MISO to co-develop two new 765-kilovolt Illinois transmission lines, forming part of a planned high-voltage backbone to bolster Midwestern grid reliability by 2034. This win expands Ameren’s role in regional infrastructure build-out, potentially increasing its long-term regulated asset base and reinforcing its position in large-scale transmission development. We’ll now examine how Ameren’s leadership role in these...
